testcase.name: test_generated_pdf_contains_required_sections

failure.message:

%\x93\x8c\x8b\x9e ReportLab Generated PDF document (opensource)

<<

>>
endobj

<<

>>
endobj

>>
endobj

<<

>>

<<

/Font 1 0 R /ProcSet [ /PDF /Text /ImageB /ImageC /ImageI ]
>> /Rotate 0 /Trans <<

>> 
 /Type /Page
>>
endobj

<<

>>
endobj

<<

testcase.name: test_pdf_contains_roller_schematic_elements

failure.message:
AssertionError: PDF should contain 'CONVERO SOLUTIONS' assert 'CONVERO SOLUTIONS' in '%PDF-1.4
%\x93\x8c\x8b\x9e ReportLab Generated PDF document (opensource)
1 0 obj
<<
/F1 2 0 R /F2 3 0 R /F3 4 0 R
>>
endobj

>>
endobj

>>
endobj

<<

>> /Rotate 0 /Trans <<

>> 
 /Type /Page
>>
endobj

<<

>>
endobj

testcase.failure:
tests/test_drawing_pdf.py:357: in test_pdf_contains_roller_schematic_elements assert element in content, f"PDF should contain '{element}'" E AssertionError: PDF should contain 'CONVERO SOLUTIONS' E assert 'CONVERO SOLUTIONS' in '%PDF-1.4
%\x93\x8c\x8b\x9e ReportLab Generated PDF document (opensource)

 /Type /Page
